allow: Bash(python -c "from models import *; from schemas import *; print\('Models OK'\); from main import app; print\('Main OK'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['full_name'], r['html_url']\) for r in data.get\('items',[]\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['full_name'], '-', r['description']\) for r in data.get\('items',[]\)[:5]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['full_name'], r['stargazers_count'], '-', r.get\('description',''\)\) for r in data.get\('items',[]\)[:8]]")
